name: scg-contabilidad
description: Sistema de Contabilidad Ganadera — React + Node

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client
scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n API,WEB -c blue,green "npm run dev --prefix server" "wait-on -t 60000 http-get://127.0.0.1:3001/api/health && npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix client && npm run build --prefix server
